pi_items.source: Verified against the target domain explicitly specified in the task description instructions and checked by verifier.py logic.
Verified against the target client ID explicitly specified in the task description instructions and checked by verifier.py logic.

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the target production domain ('https://app.socioboard.com') and the target Google Client ID ('5544332211-prod.apps.googleusercontent.com') exactly match the explicit instructions in the prompt and the strict string matching constraints in the verifier.py logic. The configuration environment is dynamically pre-conditioned via a Python script in setup_task.sh to enforce baseline synthetic local values.
